name: Cape Breton Oatmeal Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine.
2. Gradually add the brown sugar and vanilla to the margarine.
3. Add the rolled oats, flour, and baking powder to the mixture. Combine well.
4. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface.
5. Knead the dough lightly.
6. Pat or roll the dough into a rectangular shape, ensuring it is not too thin.
7. Cut the dough into slices.
8. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) for 20-25 minutes.
9. Cool on wire racks.
